mano_cua.result_summary: 未在页面中找到目标功能入口。创建页面组件需要文件系统操作（在pages/目录下创建.vue文件），localhost:3000无内置代码编辑器，Nuxt DevTools返回500。无法在浏览器内完成definePageMeta宏测试
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All the Nuxt Bridge tabs are showing the same localhost:3000 page. The application doesn't provide any browser-based code editor or file management interface for creating Vue page components. Creating page components requires editing .vue files in the pages/ directory via file system access. The Nuxt DevTools at /__nuxt_devtools__/ returns internal server error. Since the browser doesn't provide file editing functionality, cannot complete the task within browser constraints.
